top_findings.title: 4 controller integration tests fail — H2 IDENTITY sequence not reset across @Transactional rollback
top_findings.evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.7917 => 19/24 pass; BookControllerIntegrationTest asserts absolute ids/Location (lines 51,143,178,199) but @Transactional rollback does not reset the auto-increment counter
top_findings.suggestion: Capture the created id from the POST response and use it in subsequent requests, or reset the schema per test, instead of hard-coding id=1
